finite_crucible_requirements: Every registered crucible must bind a finite crucible_id, immutable spec_ref, promotion_scope, and trust_zone.
Every crucible spec must bind domain, scenario title, kernel targets, expected outcome, and replay expectations.
finite_pressure_requirements: Pressure taxonomy must remain finite and explicit.
Pressure behavior rows must cover all ratified pressure levels.
Unbound pressures remain lab-only and cannot count toward promotion eligibility.

promotion_eligibility_rule.rule_text: Adapters may only be promoted in later Gate D steps from registered crucible results that are receipt-backed, replay-backed when required, outcome-matching, and governance-clean where the crucible spec requires governance enforcement.

r1_success_criteria: Coverage matrix can be derived from registered crucible specs and observed runs.
Crucible execution evidence is replayable and receipt-backed where required.
Pressure delta summary can be derived from registered runs relative to baseline kernels.
Later adapter promotion eligibility is fail-closed and evidence-bound.
forbidden_scope: Adapter lifecycle ratification beyond promotion eligibility binding.
Tournament, merge, or rollback ratification beyond documentary prerequisites.
Router shadow evaluation or router proof.
Externality widening, comparative widening, or commercial activation.
claim_boundary: B04.R1 ratifies only the crucible and pressure forcing-law spine. It does not ratify adapter lifecycle, tournament, router, lobes, externality, product, or comparative scope.
